description: Use this API to set the definition of an zone subsystem. This can be used to toggle a particular zone subsystem on or off. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = zsysdef(sid, defined)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid zone subsystem id. valid zone subsystem ids range from 0 to 11. (input).

parameters.name: defined
parameters.description: Flag to mark the zone subsystem as undefined/defined. (input).

defined.description: mark the zone subsystem as undefined.
mark the zone subsystem as defined.
